ddls:
CREATE TABLE "spectra" (
  "spectrum_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each spectroscopic observation */,
  "star_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the star being observed */,
  "mjdstart" REAL /* Modified Julian Date of the observation */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the observation */,
  "telescope" TEXT /* Name of the telescope used for the observation */,
  "instrument" TEXT /* Name of the instrument used for the observation */,
  "exposure_time" REAL /* Exposure time of the observation in seconds */,
  "resolution" REAL /* Spectral resolution of the observation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the spectrum record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the spectrum record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spectrum_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emission_lines" (
  "line_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each emission line */,
  "spectrum_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the spectrum containing the emission line */,
  "element" TEXT /* Element responsible for the emission line (e.g., Si, N, C) */,
  "f_value" REAL /* F-value of the emission line */,
  "e_value" REAL /* E-value of the emission line */,
  "b_value" REAL /* B-value of the emission line */,
  "wavelength" REAL /* Wavelength of the emission line in Angstroms */,
  "intensity" REAL /* Intensity of the emission line */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the emission line record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the emission line record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("line_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emission_lines_spectrum_id FOREIGN KEY ("spectrum_id") REFERENCES spectra ("spectrum_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "absorption_lines" (
  "line_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each absorption line */,
  "spectrum_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the spectrum containing the absorption line */,
  "element" TEXT /* Element responsible for the absorption line (e.g., Si, N, C) */,
  "f_value" REAL /* F-value of the absorption line */,
  "e_value" REAL /* E-value of the absorption line */,
  "b_value" REAL /* B-value of the absorption line */,
  "wavelength" REAL /* Wavelength of the absorption line in Angstroms */,
  "intensity" REAL /* Intensity of the absorption line */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the absorption line record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the absorption line record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("line_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_absorption_lines_spectrum_id FOREIGN KEY ("spectrum_id") REFERENCES spectra ("spectrum_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution affiliated with the researcher */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or role of the researcher */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the researcher record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the researcher record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the researcher who published the paper */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Journal where the publication was published */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of publication */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the publication */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the publication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the publication record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the publication record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyses" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "spectrum_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the spectrum being analyzed */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the researcher who performed the analysis */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  "results" TEXT /* Results of the analysis */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used for the analysis */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used in the analysis */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analysis record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analysis record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_spectrum_id FOREIGN KEY ("spectrum_id") REFERENCES spectra ("spectrum_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "spectrum_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the spectrum being accessed */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the researcher who accessed the spectrum */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the spectrum was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the researcher who accessed the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the researcher's browser */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log record was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_spectrum_id FOREIGN KEY ("spectrum_id") REFERENCES spectra ("spectrum_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)
